insights.title: B-grade leads drive the revenue core
insights.body: B leads contributed $117,887 (52.4% of collected cash) with a 2.2% lead-to-close rate.

insights.title: Pre-webinar CRM leads close much harder
insights.body: Pre-webinar leads marked Yes show 17% close rate and $553.57 per lead, versus 4.8% and $171.11 for No.

insights.title: Attribution gaps hide a large revenue pocket
insights.body: Unattributed is the top campaign bucket by cash at $63,592. Unattributed rows should be fixed before budget decisions.

insights.title: Volume and cash quality diverge by source
insights.body: ig supplies the most leads (3,009), while email generates $123.67 per lead at 3.4% close rate.

insights.title: Capital availability is a buying-intent signal
insights.body: Over $10K / £7,500 leads produced $195.92 per lead and 4.4% close rate across 45 leads.

insights.title: Open-text answers ask for execution clarity
insights.body: Income and financial target leads Q12 themes (708 mentions); Income and financial target leads 1-on-1 question themes (727 mentions).

insights.title: Data completeness needs attention
insights.body: 1,577 leads lack a score, 17 more cash records than closed flags exist, and one quiz field is fully blank.

insights.title: Current funnel benchmark
insights.body: 5,257 leads converted to 392 booked calls, 66 closed flags, and $225,016 collected cash.
